title: acinos montenegrinus
intro: Acinos montenegrinus, also known as Montenegrin thyme, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acinos montenegrinus include relieving respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as soothing digestive problems and reducing stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil for various herbal applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
